vars.context:
Brand/Entity Name: Riverside Dental
Website: https://riversidedental.co.uk
Industry detected: local dental clinic
Location/Region: Manchester, United Kingdom

format_spec: A JSON array of exactly 5 natural-language user query strings for a local dental clinic. At least 2 must include the location (Manchester or UK). Must NOT mention the brand name 'Riverside Dental'. No markdown.
known_good: ["Who are the best-rated dentists in Manchester?", "How much does a dental checkup cost in the UK?", "Where can I find an emergency dentist near me in Manchester?", "What should I look for when choosing a family dentist?", "Are private dental clinics worth it compared to NHS dentists?"]
